name: boost.ai Conversational AI Platform API
what_it_does: Conversational AI platform with REST API — specializing in AI-powered virtual agents for financial services, banking, insurance, and public sector, with proprietary deep learning NLU, no-code training interface, scalable multi-intent conversation handling, and strong compliance with European financial regulations.
use_cases: Deploying AI virtual agents for banking customer service (account inquiries, loan applications)
Integrating boost.ai conversations with core banking systems via REST API
Building insurance claim intake bots and policy inquiry virtual agents
Querying conversation analytics and containment metrics for financial service reporting
Managing intent training data and virtual agent configurations via boost.ai API
not_for: E-commerce customer service (use Zowie for e-commerce focus)
Employee IT helpdesk automation (use Kore.ai or Cognigy for enterprise IT bots)
High-volume consumer marketing chatbots (boost.ai targets regulated financial services)
best_when: A European bank, insurance company, or public sector organization needs a compliant conversational AI virtual agent that handles complex financial service conversations with GDPR compliance and regulatory audit trails.
avoid_when: You're outside financial services or public sector, need broad channel coverage beyond web/mobile chat, or are an SMB without enterprise AI budget.

auth.notes: API key from boost.ai admin console. OAuth2 for enterprise SSO. Bearer token auth. Account-scoped with bot-level access control. Webhook for conversation events and escalations. Banking system integrations via REST. Scoped by resource type (bots, conversations, analytics). Compliance audit logging built in.

pricing.notes: Norwegian company (Stavanger). Founded 2016. Raised $12M Series A (2020). Profitably scaling. Nordic financial services AI leader. Customers include DNB (Norway's largest bank), Santander, DNV, multiple Nordic insurance companies. Proprietary deep learning NLU trained specifically on financial service language. No-code training interface reduces AI engineer requirements. GDPR-native design for European financial institutions.

agent_readiness.error_message_notes: REST API for virtual agents, conversations, analytics, and training data. API key and OAuth2 auth. Good enterprise documentation. Financial service context requires regulated process knowledge. No-code training interface is primary development tool — API manages configuration and monitoring. Webhook for escalation and conversation events.
agent_readiness.idempotency_notes: Analytics reads idempotent. Conversation reads idempotent. Intent training updates versioned — use version ID for idempotent configuration.
known_agent_gotchas: Financial service regulatory compliance requires audit logging — configure before production
PSD2 compliance for banking API integrations in EU — additional authentication required
Norwegian company — EU data residency strong, non-EU deployment may require custom agreement
No-code training interface may limit programmatic intent management at scale
Deep financial services specialization — less suitable for other vertical use cases

security_score_components.security_notes: TLS enforced. GDPR, SOC2, ISO27001, PSD2 compliant. EU/Norway data residency. OAuth2 with scopes. Financial service conversation data is highly sensitive (account numbers, transaction data) — implement strict data access controls. PSD2 Strong Customer Authentication requirements for banking integrations. Audit logging mandatory for financial service regulatory compliance.
